message:
refactor(codegen): Migrate more bracket patterns to emitCallCtx

- file.zig: genFileRead uses emitCallCtx for PyFile.read/readN
- string.zig: genSplit uses emitCallCtx for stringSplitWhitespace
- assign.zig: runtime.discard uses emitCallCtx
- module_functions.zig: support.adjust_int_max_str_digits uses emitCallCtx
